basics.name: Jordan Rivera
basics.label: Senior Product Designer · Design Systems & 0→1 · B2B SaaS
basics.summary: Senior Product Designer, 8 years across fintech, marketplace, and agency work, specializing in design systems at scale and 0→1 product design. Built a 120-component tokenized system adopted by 5 teams (~32% adoption lift) and cut design QA rework roughly in half. Accessibility-first IC who pairs through implementation, targeting Staff design-systems ownership.

highlights: Built Beacon's design system from scratch, 120 tokenized Figma components + a Storybook library, adopted by 5 product teams and lifting new-feature adoption ~32%.
Brought the library to WCAG 2.1 AA and drove a design-engineering partnership through implementation, cutting spec-drift defects ~44%.
Established design-system governance and a contribution model, consolidating 40+ ad-hoc patterns so teams extend the system instead of forking it.
Redesigned the B2B partner dashboard from funnel and survey data, lifting product NPS from 22 to 41; mentors 3–4 designers and runs crits.
Designed the driver-onboarding flow 0→1 (research through ship), cutting first-week drop-off from 41% to 24% across ~40k monthly signups.
Ran 130+ moderated usability sessions over three years to steer marketplace roadmap decisions.
Delivered 0→1 designs for 7 agency client engagements across SaaS, retail, and healthcare, and a retail self-checkout concept shipped to pilot.

projects.name: Beacon Design System
projects.description: 120 components, tokens, Storybook, WCAG 2.1 AA; ~32% adoption lift on adopting teams.
